_comment: Policy file for the navbar+footer drift gate. Edit ONLY when intentionally changing the canonical block; reference the protocol in scripts/check_navbar_footer_drift.py and CONTRIBUTING-style hash-update notes in PR descriptions.

footer_block.update_protocol: When intentionally changing the footer, update canonical_md5 here in the same PR. PR description must explicitly note: 'footer canonical hash changed XXXX -> YYYY'. Without this note, the drift gate will block the merge.

header_navbar_block.extraction_note: Non-greedy match captures the FIRST <nav>...</nav> block per page, which is always the top header (class="fixed top-0..."). Inner sidebar <nav> blocks on docs.html etc. are NOT captured and are out of scope for this gate.
header_navbar_block.update_protocol: When intentionally changing the top navbar, update canonical_md5 here in the same PR. PR description must explicitly note: 'header canonical hash changed XXXX -> YYYY'. Without this note, the drift gate will block the merge.
